skipped_criteria: Transport after injury to a participating PAIN Trauma center: cannot be expressed with available schema fields (no field for participating center affiliation).
Shock Index (SI) ≥0.9: SI is a derived value (HR/SBP) requiring compound arithmetic logic not supported by the schema operators; HR ≥115 is partially encoded as a soft inclusion rule.
Intravenous pain medication indicated (CPOT≥2, NRS≥5): pain scale scores (CPOT, NRS) are not available schema fields.
No IV access exclusion: IV access status is not an available schema field.

Females <50 years of age exclusion: requires a compound condition combining sex=F AND age<50, which cannot be expressed as a single rule in the schema without risking incorrect exclusion of males; no compound boolean logic is supported.
Advanced airway management prior to first dose administration: airway management status is not an available schema field.
Known allergy to fentanyl citrate or ketamine hydrochloride: allergy history is not an available schema field.
Known prisoner: prisoner status is not an available schema field.
Objection to study voiced by subject or family member at scene: consent/objection status is not an available schema field.
Pain treatment contraindicated by local protocol: local protocol contraindication is not an available schema field.
Wearing a 'NO PAIN STUDY' bracelet: opt-out bracelet status is not an available schema field.
